question: Can I send gifts to my loved ones?
answer: Yes, you can send any of the products available on www.godachi.com as gifts to your loved ones along with a personalized message.

question: What happens if my order is lost in transit?
answer: In the unlikely event that an order gets lost during transit, we wait for 15 days to track your lost order and if we are still unsuccessful, then we process your refund through the payment mode that you had opted for at the time of placing the order.

question: How I can change the Delivery address ?
answer: If your order has not yet been picked up from our warehouse, we can change your delivery address. You can contact to our customer care and we will do our best to help! If the order has already been dispatched, there is very little we can do to update the address, but still we will try to call back the order and send you a new package from our side depends on location pin code.

question: I am out of station can you arrange the delivery when I come back to my house?
answer: We can hold on  your order, If you order is not yet shipped. Please email us with order number when you would like us to ship it and we will move accordingly. Otherwise, if the order is already in transit, we will request the shipping partner to hold it for you for a few days and reattempt delivery, however, please note this is not an assured service.

question: Can I make the payment online when the parcel arrive?
answer: Most of our shipping partners offer to collect COD payment via GPay/PhonePe/ PayTm, so you can request the delivery person to receive the payment via UPI.

question: The coupon code received is not working.
answer: Please note coupon codes are case sensitive and It is also possible that the coupon code is old and might have expired, in which case, we request you to reach out to our customer care with a picture of the code, and we will do our best to help!

question: How I can buy a pendant and matching earring set?
answer: We have Sets as one of our categories where you can find predefined matching pendants and earrings. Please browse to Categories, Sets.

question: I forgot while ordering so, could you add a note while delivering the parcel ?
answer: Please reach out to our customer care and we will do our best to help. However, please note that this is not an assured service, once the order has been placed without a note, there is a good chance that we may not be able to add the note despite you informing us before shipping, however, we will try our best.

question: I returned my product for exchange, when will I get the replacement ?
answer: In case you have opted for replacement, your replacement gets shipped out within 48 hours of the initial order is return picked up. Once the new order is created, you will receive confirmation over email o message.

question: I have returned my product whereas did not get refund.
answer: Please note that we initiate refunds within 72 hrs of the return getting picked up from you. Once the refund is initiated, it should be credited in your bank account/payment source in 10 working days. If still not received, please reach out to our customer care and we will escalate this matter to our bank/gateway partners.
